title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.365 - Party failing to comply with decree, effect of
text:
452.365.  Party failing to comply with decree, effect of. — If a party fails to comply with a provision of a decree or temporary order or injunction, the obligation of the other party to make payments for support or maintenance or to permit visitation is not suspended but he may move the court to grant an appropriate order.
(L. 1973 H.B. 315 § 14) 
Effective 1-01-74
